introduction: I'm here to answer all your queries related to our products and services. Please note I am powered by AI, so the information I provide may not be completely accurate.
message:
Great, let’s get you started.
Getting a Personal Loan is simple, requires no collateral and is for both salaried and non-salaried individuals. Here are some details:
title: Get a Personal Loan in just 24 hours
label: Shop for 1 million+ products with this card
loan_amount_2: Apply with just a few basic documents
loan_amount_3: Repay over tenures of up to 96 months
question: What are the applicable fees and charges?
response_message: We are glad to give you more details.
please_enter_your_placeholder_as_per_you: Please Enter your placeholder as per your PAN
column_content_7: Interest-only instalments for the initial tenure
column_content_9: Up to 1.18% (inclusive of applicable taxes) of the total withdrawable amount during initial loan tenure. Up to 0.295% (inclusive of applicable taxes) of total withdrawable amount during subsequent loan tenure.
column_content_11: A one-time fixed fee depending on the loan amount
column_content_13: Withdraw and prepay conveniently from your sanctioned loan limit
prompt_2: What are the types of variants?
